Lorem Ipsum Generator

Generate placeholder text for your layouts and mockups. Choose how many paragraphs you need and copy instantly.

3
110
Need to make an image file smaller?Try Image Compressor

How to use

  1. Choose the number of paragraphs you need using the selector.
  2. The text generates automatically based on your selection.
  3. Click Copy All to copy all generated text to your clipboard in one step.

Tips for best results

  • Match paragraph count to your real content estimate. If your article typically runs 600 words across four sections, use 2–3 paragraphs per section so the layout reflects realistic content density rather than artificially short or long blocks that won't represent the final reading experience.
  • Verify word count before handing off layouts. Copy the generated text into the word counter to confirm the total volume matches the content density your design was built for, a 200-word placeholder fills a container very differently than a 600-word article in the same space.
  • Test heading casing with the case converter. Use the case converter to transform generic placeholder headings into Title Case or Sentence case so your mockup reflects the typographic style you're actually targeting before design review.
  • Spot unintentional text changes between layout versions. If you've iterated on a design and want to confirm only the layout changed, paste both versions of the placeholder into the text difference checker to detect any unintentional copy modifications between iterations.

Why use PixMidas

  • Instant generation. Placeholder text appears immediately, no server round-trip needed.
  • Adjustable length. Choose from 1 to 10 paragraphs to match the density of your layout.
  • No account needed. Free with no character limits.

Frequently asked questions

What is Lorem Ipsum?

Lorem ipsum is placeholder text used by designers and developers to fill layouts where real content isn't yet available. It's derived from a scrambled passage of Cicero's "de Finibus Bonorum et Malorum" (45 BC) and has been used in typesetting since the 1960s. The familiar opening "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet" is recognized globally as intentional filler, not real content. Its widespread use across design tools, CMS platforms and prototyping software means any design reviewer will immediately understand it as placeholder copy without needing an explanation.

Why do designers use fake Latin instead of real words?

Real text in a reader's language is too easy to read, it distracts reviewers from evaluating typography, layout and spacing decisions. Lorem ipsum is immediately recognizable as placeholder copy, which keeps design review sessions focused on the visual design rather than the content meaning. Using real words also risks stakeholders reading a draft as final approved copy, which can cause confusion about what has and hasn't been signed off during the review process.

How many paragraphs should I use?

For a typical webpage section or email template: 2–3 paragraphs. For a full-page mockup like a landing page or brochure: 4–6 paragraphs. For testing pagination, scrolling or overflow behavior: use the maximum setting to stress-test the layout with significant content volume. After generating, paste the text into the word counter to confirm you have the right volume for the layout you're filling.

What is the history of Lorem Ipsum?

The text has been the printing industry's standard placeholder since the 1500s, when a printer scrambled a Cicero passage to create a type specimen book. It was popularized in the 1960s through Letraset dry-transfer sheets and went digital with early desktop publishing software. It remains the standard today precisely because it is universally recognized as placeholder copy. Several modern variants exist, "hipster ipsum," "bacon ipsum" and other joke generators, but the original Latin version remains the safest choice for professional design work where reviewers may not share the same cultural references.

Can I use this text in production?

No, only in mockups and prototypes. Replace all placeholder copy with real content before going live. Some CMS platforms and SEO tools flag lorem ipsum in published content as an error. Search engines may also treat it as low-quality content, so any page containing lorem ipsum text should be kept in draft or marked no-index until replaced with real copy.

Privacy Note & Disclaimer

PixMidas is designed to process files directly in your browser whenever possible, and we do not intentionally store or inspect your files. However, no online service can guarantee absolute security, so please avoid highly sensitive data. By using PixMidas, you acknowledge that files are processed at your own discretion and risk.
